# unity-csharp-guide

> Unity C# code generation best practices. Use when writing C# for Unity (MonoBehaviour, ScriptableObject, serialization, async/await, IL2CPP, hot-path allocation) to avoid common AI mistakes and version-gated API misuse.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install bigdra50/skills/lang/unity-csharp-guide
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - bigdra50/skills/lang/unity-csharp-guide
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add bigdra50/skills --skill unity-csharp-guide
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit bigdra50/skills/lang/unity-csharp-guide ~/.claude/skills/unity-csharp-guide
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
